title: Dark Cycle Adaptation Erasure
pattern: Historical accounts of volcanic winters, ash years, or multi-year darkness omit Indigenous adaptation practices (animal cooperation, dung fertilization, food moderation).
signal: Narratives reduce survival to famine/competition while ignoring relational abundance strategies.
impact: Reinforces scarcity myths; erases ecological memory of Indigenous science.

pad.source: inferred from keyword analysis of sensor content
